utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look what I got ! Look what I got ! Look what I got ! Can you believe they make these for little people ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , look at this one . This is my favourite .

emotion_cause.span: 3_look at this one . This is my favourite .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know ! Phoebe is gonna love dressing them in these !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Phoebe is gonna love dressing them in these !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Huh . Except , Phoebe not gonna be the one that gets to dress them .

emotion_cause.span: 6_Phoebe not gonna be the one that gets to dress them .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Because she is not gonna get to keep the babies .

emotion_cause.span: 7_she is not gonna get to keep the babies .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God ! We are throwing the most depressing baby shower ever !

emotion_cause.span: 8_We are throwing the most depressing baby shower ever !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Unless , we give her all gifts she can use after she is done being pregnant .

emotion_cause.span: 10_we give her all gifts she can use after she is done being pregnant .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Like ... like umm , regular coffee , Tequila .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , and somebody can get those leather pants she is always wanted !

emotion_cause.span: 12_somebody can get those leather pants she is always wanted !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , she is gonna love that !
